headline: How Danske Bank (CPSE:DANSKE)’s Investment Story Is Shifting With New Targets And Fair Value
summary: Danske Bank’s internal fair value estimate has been revised from DKK 347.79 to DKK 357.44, which puts fresh attention on where current price targets sit versus updated valuation work. Recent research shows some banks lifting targets, such as Citi moving to DKK 375, while others have trimmed their numbers. This leaves you with a mixed but active set of views to weigh. As you read on, you will see how to track these shifting targets and use them to follow the evolving analyst narrative around...
